fields.label: Required
fields.description: If checked, missing source value raises regardless of missing_field_policy.

fields.label: Transform Args
fields.description: Optional arguments for the transformer (e.g., {from, to} for date_format).

fields.label: Condition
fields.description: Sandboxed Python expression. Allowed names (push): source_doc. (pull): source_payload. Rule applies only if expression is truthy.

fields.label: Default Value
fields.description: Used when source field is absent (per parent's missing_field_policy).

fields.label: Validate Against
fields.description: Optional Frappe DocType name. Translated value must exist as a record.
